name: URL Reputation Assessment
description: Assesses the reputation of suspicious URLs by enriching against multiple threat feeds and URL analysis services. The playbook extracts URLs from the alert, checks each against VirusTotal and URL scanning services, then uses AI to determine if URLs are phishing, malware delivery, C2 communication, or benign. Malicious URLs are blocked on the web proxy, added to the URL blocklist, and users who accessed the URL are notified. Clean URLs are annotated and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Scan URLs for malicious content, phishing indicators, and detection ratios across security vendors

required_integrations.name: urlscan.io
required_integrations.reason: Perform live URL scanning to capture page screenshots, DOM content, and network requests

config.description: Triggers when a suspicious URL alert is ingested from proxy logs, threat feeds, or user reports

config.code:
import re
from urllib.parse import urlparse

alert = inputs.get('alert', {})
raw_text = str(alert)

url_pattern = r'https?://[^\s<>"\')]+'
urls = list(set(re.findall(url_pattern, raw_text)))

normalized = []
for url in urls:
    parsed = urlparse(url)
    normalized.append({
        'url': url,
        'domain': parsed.hostname or '',
        'scheme': parsed.scheme,
        'path': parsed.path
    })

result = {
    'urls': normalized,
    'total_count': len(normalized),
    'domains': list(set([u['domain'] for u in normalized]))
}
config.description: Extracts and normalizes all URLs from the alert, parsing out domains, paths, and schemes
Enriches all extracted URLs against VirusTotal and urlscan.io for detection ratios, page analysis, and threat categorization

config.additional_instructions: Assess each URL for threat type: phishing, malware delivery, C2 communication, exploit kit, or benign. Consider domain age, hosting infrastructure, page content analysis, and threat feed matches. Provide confidence level for each URL.
config.description: AI-powered assessment determining the threat type and confidence level for each suspicious URL
Routes based on whether any URLs were assessed as malicious by the enrichment and AI analysis
Blocks all malicious URLs and their domains on the web proxy to prevent user access
Adds malicious URLs to the blocklist EDL and notifies the SOC team
Documents that all URLs were assessed as clean with no blocking action taken
